item.text:
VERDICT: FAIL

1. `just gov-check` still fails on the committed merge candidate `dbe7dc90024dc52fd48d6e1be82ef73c220527db` because [GIT_TOPOLOGY_REGISTRY.json](/D:/Projects/LLM%20projects/Handshake/Handshake%20Worktrees/wt-VALTMP-WP-1-Structured-Collaboration-Schema-Registry-v1-dbe7dc9/.GOV/roles_shared/GIT_TOPOLOGY_REGISTRY.json) is stale. Exact blocker output: `FAIL: .GOV/roles_shared/GIT_TOPOLOGY_REGISTRY.json is stale; run just topology-registry-sync`.
